_note: Baselined dependency advisories for the CI dependency-audit gate (issue #22). Keyed by GHSA ID. The gate fails only on critical/high advisories NOT listed here. To ACCEPT a new finding: add it with a reason, an accepted_on date, a review_by date, and a tracking ref, under security-engineer review. review_by is when the acceptance must be re-justified or remediated; past that date the gate emits a non-fatal warning so a deferred risk cannot sit invisible. To mark RESOLVED: remove its entry once the dependency is bumped.

GHSA-5xrq-8626-4rwp.title: When Vitest UI server is listening, arbitrary file can be read and executed
GHSA-5xrq-8626-4rwp.reason: Vitest UI server arbitrary file read/exec. Dev/test tooling only, never shipped to patients or run in prod. Accepted pending vitest 3.2.6+ bump (spec 30).

GHSA-36qx-fr4f-26g5.title: Next.js has a Middleware / Proxy bypass in Pages Router applications using i18n
GHSA-36qx-fr4f-26g5.reason: Next.js middleware/proxy bypass (Pages Router i18n). Production framework; patched by the next 14->15 migration.

GHSA-8h8q-6873-q5fj.title: Next.js Vulnerable to Denial of Service with Server Components
GHSA-8h8q-6873-q5fj.reason: Next.js DoS via Server Components. Production framework, patient-facing; patched by the next 14->15 migration.

GHSA-c4j6-fc7j-m34r.title: Next.js vulnerable to server-side request forgery in applications using WebSocket upgrades
GHSA-c4j6-fc7j-m34r.reason: Next.js SSRF via WebSocket upgrades. Production framework, patient-facing, self-hosted deployment; patched by the next 14->15 migration.

GHSA-fx2h-pf6j-xcff.title: vite: `server.fs.deny` bypass on Windows alternate paths
GHSA-fx2h-pf6j-xcff.reason: Vite server.fs.deny bypass (Windows dev server). Dev/build tooling only, not shipped. Cleared transitively by the vitest 2->3 bump.

GHSA-h25m-26qc-wcjf.title: Next.js HTTP request deserialization can lead to DoS when using insecure React Server Components
GHSA-h25m-26qc-wcjf.reason: Next.js HTTP request deserialization DoS. Production framework, patient-facing; patched by the next 14->15 migration.

GHSA-q4gf-8mx6-v5v3.title: Next.js has a Denial of Service with Server Components
GHSA-q4gf-8mx6-v5v3.reason: Next.js DoS with Server Components. Production framework, patient-facing; patched by the next 14->15 migration.
